US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board | Al Jazeera
Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end
Fed holds interest rates steady for third straight meeting, as Powell vows to remain as governor - CBS News
FOMC Meeting 2026 Highlights: Fed Interest Rates Stays 3.75%

summary_extracted: Fed held rates at 3.5-3.75% target range on April 29 (third consecutive hold). Historic 8-4 dissent. Three dissenters wanted easing bias removed; one (Miran, Trump appointee) wanted immediate cut. Powell's chairmanship ends May 15; Kevin Warsh nominated as successor. Fed cited Middle East tensions and elevated energy prices as inflation risks.
